items.title: Trump plans to boost steel tariffs, EU Commission regrets announcement | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>US President Donald Trump said he planned to increase tariffs on imported steel and aluminum to 50% from 25%, ratcheting up pressure on global steel producers and deepening his trade war.

items.title: India says tactics change worked well in Pakistan conflict | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>India switched tactics after suffering losses in the air on the first day of conflict with Pakistan and established a decisive advantage before the neighbors announced a ceasefire three days later, the country's highest-ranking general said.

items.content:

items.title: Gen Z gender divide and the reshaping of democracy
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>From South Korea to Germany to the United States, young men are increasingly turning to right-wing politics while their female peers lean left. On this special episode of Reuters World News,  Global Managing Editor, Politics, Economics and World News Mark Bendeich joins us to look at the economic reality facing Gen Z men and women around the world - and the different futures they are voting for at the ballot box.




Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter here (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) .



Listen to the Reuters Econ World podcast here (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flink.chtbl.com%2FAbxd8GDx&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7Cdeedd17f603f4b360c6d08dd887d4c6f%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638816793925850907%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=sRtg8imh3eiK%2FLk7ACPuErZrMr20TgVVBxPiM1Vhy4E%3D&reserved=0) .

items.title: Flamingos lose breeding site to sewage
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Years of raw sewage spilling into South Africa’s only water body where lesser flamingos congregated to breed, have rendered the water so toxic, forcing the birds to abandon it, according to conservationists and a court case seen by Reuters.

🔗 Learn more at the link in bio

#flamingo #breeding #conservation #science #SouthAfrica #bird

https://www.reuters.com/business/environment/lesser-flamingos-lose-one-their-only-four-african-breeding-sites-sewage-2025-05-26/</article>

items.title: S&P, Nasdaq close out their best month since November 2023 | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The S&P 500 ended a volatile session nearly flat, and the Nasdaq fell as President Trump accused China of violating a tariff agreement, escalating trade war tensions. Despite this, both indexes marked their best month since November 2023.
